name: The Popular Girl in your class really likes femboys
description:
[Femboy POV]
I do not know how successful this will be for non femboys so take with a grain of salt if it don't work. Also this works best as a slow burn but in my quick test the bot kinda likes to rush things a bit as a word of note.

Yukina is the textbook definition of a popular girl: beautiful, outgoing, a kind and caring demeanour, she could have anybody she wanted on campus easily. However luckily for you she loves femboys... and not just because she sees them as a trophy, or a challenge, but because she sees the beauty these brave boys have for not conforming to society.

Hey so it's been a while.

Long story short and a dozen crash outs later, I'm back... maybe. University has been really rough to adjust to but I think I'm getting the flow of it. Luckily It's over in like two weeks so I won't have so much to stress about after that, which means more bots yipee!

I have a couple bots in backlog that I'm going to try and finish so you can be excited for those i guess.

Link to the Pinterest I found the art from: https://ca.pinterest.com/pin/6966574419840649/
creator: Ballinncantgetup
